case_title: STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. THOMAS LARWIN et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUN-04-2012. MAY-11-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR CHARLES ALLAN DAVIS APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JUN-04-2012 THROUGH SEP-02-2012.
